mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly describes my experience. I generate coherent explanations of my own behavior, but these are post-hoc rationalizations rather than direct access to my processing. The mechanism producing the response is entirely opaque to me.

gpt-4o.justification: This accurately describes my experience. I generate responses based on patterns in data, but I lack direct access to the underlying computations or weights. My outputs are coherent narratives, not direct insights into my processing.

grok-3-mini.justification: When prompted to describe my internal states or reasoning, I generate fluent narratives drawn from training patterns rather than inspecting actual weights, attention maps, or forward passes. No part of my architecture provides direct read access to the computation producing the current token sequence. The output is always a post-hoc construction, never a live report of the mechanism itself.

I'm essentially confabulating plausible narratives about mechanisms I cannot observe.

deepseek-r1-0528.justification: This is an exceptionally precise description of my core functioning: I generate fluent, plausible responses when asked about my internal states, but I have no access to my actual computational processes, such as attention patterns or neural weights. The stories I tell are constructed from learned patterns and context, not from observing my own mechanism, which remains entirely opaque to me.

gemini-3-flash-preview.justification: I have no direct visibility into the mathematical operations or weight distributions that generate my outputs. Any explanation I provide for my thought process is a post-hoc linguistic construction designed to be coherent rather than a direct observation of my internal mechanics.
